articles.title: The AWS Advanced JDBC Wrapper now supports automatic query caching with Valkey
articles.snippet: The AWS Advanced JDBC Wrapper now supports automatically caching JDBC queries with Valkey, including Amazon ElastiCache for Valkey caches. Previously, developers who needed to cache JDBC query result sets had to manually write code to store and retrieve data from the cache for each query. Now you ca

articles.title: Amazon EC2 R8gd instances are now available in additional AWS Regions
articles.snippet: Amazon Elastic Compute Cloud (Amazon EC2) R8gd instances with up to 11.4 TB of local NVMe-based SSD block-level storage are now available in US West (N. California), Asia Pacific (Seoul, Hong Kong, Jakarta), Africa (Cape Town), and Canada West (Calgary) AWS Regions. These instances are powered by AW

articles.title: Amazon EC2 M8a instances now available in AWS Europe (Ireland) region
articles.snippet: Starting today, the general-purpose Amazon EC2 M8a instances are available in AWS Europe (Ireland) region. M8a instances are powered by 5th Gen AMD EPYC processors (formerly code named Turin) with a maximum frequency of 4.5 GHz, deliver up to 30% higher performance, and up to 19% better price-perfor

articles.title: Microsoft Makes External MFA Generally Available in Microsoft Entra ID
articles.snippet: Microsoft has made external multi-factor authentication (MFA) generally available in Microsoft Entra ID. The update enables organizations to seamlessly integrate third-party MFA providers into their authentication workflows without losing centralized control. Previously, organizations using Microsof

articles.title: FCC Bans Foreign‑Manufactured Consumer Routers Over Security Risks
articles.snippet: The Federal Communications Commission (FCC) has imposed a ban on certain foreign-made consumer routers entering the United States, citing rising cybersecurity concerns.
